slots.caption_ig:
Stars don't survive scrutiny. A 4.5-star restaurant has 800 reviews of kitchen sink dishes mixed with one mind-blowing pasta. Average kills signal. We score the pasta on its own.

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart #FoodScience
slots.caption_fb: Restaurant stars are an average of every dish, every visit, every server, every Tuesday morning vs Saturday night. The signal you actually want — is THIS dish worth ordering — is buried. We score the dish. Stars don't show up in our app.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Star icons (5 of them) crossed out with red lines, replaced by a glowing red #1 rank badge. Dark moody background. Editorial graphic. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 6s. Five stars on screen. They flicker and vanish. A red #1 takes their place. Text: 'Stars don't survive scrutiny.'
